description: Lock corrections from the 2026-06-10 random quality sample: bad dates, future misclassification, and overstated generated dependencies.

checks.reason: Paper watermark authentication is anchored to medieval Fabriano-style paper watermarks, not generic early medieval paper.
The node is scoped to mass-market smartphone app stores, anchored to the 2008 iPhone App Store launch.
The node is scoped to managed cloud data warehouse services, anchored to Amazon Redshift's 2012 announcement.
Exoplanet detection is an established modern field, anchored to the 1992 pulsar-planet discovery paper.
Slow sand filtration belongs upstream of broad municipal water treatment, not downstream of it.
The sampled edge was reversed; municipal water treatment is the broader application context.
Slow sand filtration was deployed empirically before germ theory was needed as an explanatory framework.
Herbalism is plant-use knowledge and should not require pottery vessels.
Periodical scientific journals need print and scientific correspondence practices, not encyclopedic compendiums as a direct prerequisite.
Manuscript music workshops predate and do not require 1282 paper watermark authentication.
Scholastic indexing systems predate and do not require 1282 paper watermark authentication.
Relational data warehousing predates managed cloud data warehouses.
Digital-twin infrastructure predates managed cloud data warehouses and should not depend on them.
Genomic epidemiology can use data infrastructure without requiring managed cloud data warehouses.
Earth observation analytics predates managed cloud data warehouses and should depend on remote sensing rather than a later cloud product category.
Materials informatics depends on materials science, databases, and machine learning rather than the later managed cloud warehouse category.
